ops.body: SHIPPED as 9.9.0 (folded with the concurrent session's deny-wins dispatch change; 9.8.0 entry rides in the same release). main @ 3d96e549, tags v9.9.0 + captain-hook--v9.9.0 pushed; Release (PyPI) workflow success, GitHub release v9.9.0 Latest, `uvx capt-hook@9.9.0 pack lint` verified live. CI green on the superseding head f9506cb8 (contains all release commits; our own run was concurrency-cancelled by the next push). Stress: offline tier ran with 3 environmental timeouts (macOS syspolicyd exec serialization, reports produced-but-late; accepted, CI gate is pytest). Review pipeline: workflow impl (2 agents) + dead-code sweep (2 deletions, 1 keep) + codex finder (16 findings: 9 fixed, 1 daemon-lane deferred to task f976c24, 6 pre-existing recorded there) + codex refuter (10 defects, 9 fixed, 1 deferred). Shared-working-copy surgery: draft-code pollution from a concurrent session's snapshot was excised via jj workspace; the review-round commit's swallowed files restored from its pre-pollution evolution; all content re-verified at the release head before push. Remaining criterion (lint green on migrated consumers) completes with task 215f9ce.
